chunks:
# ==============================================================================
# Chapter Writing Process for IVD Book
# ==============================================================================
# Process-level intent defining the canonical workflow for writing book chapters.
# This process has been validated through Chapters 1 and 2.
#
# Reference: book/book_system_intent.yaml (system)
# Version: 1.3
# Created: 2026-01-26
# Status: Canonical
# ==============================================================================

scope:
  level: "process"
  type: "chapter_writing"
  granularity: "workflow"

# ==============================================================================
# INTENT: What should this process accomplish?
# ==============================================================================

intent:
  summary: "Canonical process for writing IVD book chapters: intent-first, research-informed, cross-verified."
  
  goal: |
    Define a repeatable, verifiable process for writing book chapters that:
    1. Follows IVD principles (intent before implementation)
    2. Ensures consistency across all chapters
    3. Maintains alignment with book master intent and research
    4. Produces high-quality manuscripts that pass all verification checks
    5. Tracks progress clearly (which step each chapter is in)
  
  success_metric: |
    - Every chapter follows this process in order
    - No chapter skips a step
    - Every completed chapter passes all verification checks
    - Status is always clear (which step we're in)
  
  stakeholders:
    - "IVD book author (manuscript writer)"
    - "AI assistant (helping with writing)"
    - "Future reviewers/editors"

# ==============================================================================
# PROCESS STEPS (Execute in order)
# ==============================================================================

steps:
  step_1_verify_prerequisites:
    name: "Verify Prerequisites"
    description: "Ensure all required parent artifacts exist before starting"
    
    inputs:
      - "book/book_system_intent.yaml (book master intent)"
      - "../research/best_selling_programming_books.md (research)"
      - "../ivd_system_intent.yaml (framework principles)"
    
    actions:
      - "Read book/book_system_intent.yaml to understand book structure, chapter requirements"
      - "Check book_structure.part_N_foundations.chapters[N] for this chapter's key_points and placeholder"
      - "Verify research exists and has synthesis section (6.1)"
      - "Identify chapter number and title from book intent"
    
    outputs:
      - "Chapter number, title, key_points, placeholder structure"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Book master intent exists and contains chapter N definition"
        test: "grep 'chapter: N' book/book_system_intent.yaml"
      - check: "Research synthesis exists"
        test: "grep '6.1 Findings' ../research/best_selling_programming_books.md"
    
    status_marker: "step_1_complete"
  
  step_2_create_chapter_folder:
    name: "Create Chapter Folder"
    description: "Create folder structure for the chapter"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_1_complete"
    
    act

number and title from book intent"
    
    outputs:
      - "Chapter number, title, key_points, placeholder structure"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Book master intent exists and contains chapter N definition"
        test: "grep 'chapter: N' book/book_system_intent.yaml"
      - check: "Research synthesis exists"
        test: "grep '6.1 Findings' ../research/best_selling_programming_books.md"
    
    status_marker: "step_1_complete"
  
  step_2_create_chapter_folder:
    name: "Create Chapter Folder"
    description: "Create folder structure for the chapter"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_1_complete"
    
    actions:
      - "Create folder: manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/"
      - "Folder naming: chapter-{zero-padded-number}-{kebab-case-title}"
    
    outputs:
      - "Empty chapter folder"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Folder exists and follows naming convention"
        test: "ls manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/"
    
    status_marker: "step_2_complete"
  
  step_3_create_chapter_intent:
    name: "Create Chapter-Level Intent"
    description: "Write intent.yaml defining what this chapter should accomplish"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_2_complete"
    
    inputs:
      - "book/book_system_intent.yaml (parent intent)"
      - "Chapter-01 intent.yaml (template/reference)"
    
    actions:
      - "Create manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - "Include required sections:"
      - "  - scope (level: module, type: chapter)"
      - "  - intent (summary, goal, success_metric, stakeholders)"
      - "  - deliverables (sections with required_content)"
      - "  - key_points (from book intent)"
      - "  - constraints (inherited from book intent + chapter-specific)"
      - "  - rationale (decision, reasoning, evidence)"
      - "  - implementation (status: pending, version: 1)"
      - "  - verification (cross_check list)"
      - "  - changelog"
      - "Reference parent: 'Reference: book/book_system_intent.yaml (system)'"
      - "Inherit constraints: chapter_takeaways, quotable_principles, writing_style_part_N, formatting_conventions"
      - "Add chapter-specific constraints if needed"
      - "For chapters that demonstrate optional sections (e.g. Ch5 interface + roles, Ch6 evaluation, Ch9 interface + roles + authorship per agent), include those sections in deliverables.required_content"
    
    outputs:
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml (status: pending)"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Intent file exists"
        test: "ls manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - check: "Intent references book master intent"
        test: "grep 'Reference: book/book_system_intent.yaml' intent.yaml"
      - check: "Intent inherits formatting_conventions constraint"
        test: "grep 'formatting_conventions' intent.yaml"
      - check: "All required sections present"
        test: "grep -E 'scope:|intent:|deliverables:|constraints:|verification:' intent.yaml | wc -l >= 5"
    
    status_marker: "step_3_complete"
  
  step_4_write_manuscript:
    name: "Write Chapter Manuscript"
    description: "Write chapter.md following the

sts"
        test: "ls manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - check: "Intent references book master intent"
        test: "grep 'Reference: book/book_system_intent.yaml' intent.yaml"
      - check: "Intent inherits formatting_conventions constraint"
        test: "grep 'formatting_conventions' intent.yaml"
      - check: "All required sections present"
        test: "grep -E 'scope:|intent:|deliverables:|constraints:|verification:' intent.yaml | wc -l >= 5"
    
    status_marker: "step_3_complete"
  
  step_4_write_manuscript:
    name: "Write Chapter Manuscript"
    description: "Write chapter.md following the chapter intent"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_3_complete"
    
    inputs:
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - "book/book_system_intent.yaml (writing_style, formatting_conventions)"
      - "../research/best_selling_programming_books.md (patterns)"
    
    actions:
      - "Create manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/chapter.md"
      - "Write intro paragraph bridging from previous chapter"
      - "Write each section from deliverables.sections in order"
      - "Follow required_content for each section"
      - "Apply writing_style.voice (mentor-like, direct, second person)"
      - "Apply writing_style.tone (high depth, high accessibility)"
      - "Apply formatting_conventions:"
      - "  - Bold for key terms on first introduction and Key Points bullets"
      - "  - Italic for emphasis and dialogue"
      - "  - Code formatting for technical terms (e.g., `intent.yaml`)"
      - "  - Proper heading format (# Chapter N:, ## N.M Section)"
      - "Include quotable lines (bold, memorable, per constraints.quotable_principles)"
      - "End with ## Key Points section (per constraints.chapter_takeaways)"
      - "Bridge to next chapter or part"
    
    outputs:
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/chapter.md (draft)"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Manuscript file exists"
        test: "ls manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/chapter.md"
      - check: "All sections from intent present"
        test: "For each deliverables.sections[].id: grep '## {id}' chapter.md"
      - check: "Key Points section exists"
        test: "grep '## Key Points' chapter.md"
      - check: "Quotable lines present (bold formatting)"
        test: "grep -E '\\*\\*[A-Z].*\\*\\*' chapter.md | wc -l >= 1"
    
    status_marker: "step_4_complete"
  
  step_5_cross_check:
    name: "Cross-Check Against Intents and Research"
    description: "Verify manuscript against all three layers: chapter intent, book intent, research"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_4_complete"
    
    inputs:
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/chapter.md"
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - "book/book_system_intent.yaml"
      - "../research/best_selling_programming_books.md"
    
    actions:
      - "Cross-check 1: Chapter Intent"
      - "  - All deliverables.sections present?"
      - "  - All required_content addressed?"
      - "  - All constraints satisfied?"
      - "  - All verification.cross_check items pass?"
      - "Cross-check 2: Book Master

uscript against all three layers: chapter intent, book intent, research"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_4_complete"
    
    inputs:
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/chapter.md"
      - "manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml"
      - "book/book_system_intent.yaml"
      - "../research/best_selling_programming_books.md"
    
    actions:
      - "Cross-check 1: Chapter Intent"
      - "  - All deliverables.sections present?"
      - "  - All required_content addressed?"
      - "  - All constraints satisfied?"
      - "  - All verification.cross_check items pass?"
      - "Cross-check 2: Book Master Intent"
      - "  - key_points reflected in Key Points section?"
      - "  - writing_style.voice matches (mentor-like, direct, second person)?"
      - "  - writing_style.tone matches (high depth, high accessibility)?"
      - "  - formatting_conventions applied (bold/italic/code)?"
      - "  - constraints satisfied (chapter_takeaways, quotable_principles)?"
      - "Cross-check 3: Research"
      - "  - Voice matches bestseller patterns (Pragmatic, Clean Code)?"
      - "  - Analogies and metaphors from canonical list used?"
      - "  - Structure follows progressive depth pattern?"
      - "  - No invented statistics without sources?"
    
    outputs:
      - "Verification results (pass/fail for each check)"
      - "List of gaps or fixes needed"
    
    verification:
      - check: "All chapter intent deliverables present"
        test: "Manual: Each section from intent.yaml exists in chapter.md"
      - check: "All book intent key_points covered"
        test: "Manual: Each key_point from book intent appears in Key Points section"
      - check: "Formatting conventions applied"
        test: "Manual: Bold for key terms, italic for emphasis, code for tech terms"
      - check: "No unsourced claims"
        test: "Manual: All statistics have citations or marked as illustrative"
    
    status_marker: "step_5_complete"
  
  step_6_update_chapter_status:
    name: "Update Chapter Intent Status"
    description: "Mark chapter intent as complete"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_5_complete (all checks pass)"
    
    actions:
      - "In manuscript/part-N-name/chapter-0N-slug/intent.yaml:"
      - "  - Change implementation.status: 'pending' → 'complete'"
      - "  - Update implementation.version if needed"
      - "  - Add changelog entry with completion date"
    
    outputs:
      - "Updated intent.yaml with status: complete"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Status updated to complete"
        test: "grep 'status: \"complete\"' intent.yaml"
    
    status_marker: "step_6_complete"
  
  step_7_update_book_intent:
    name: "Update Book Master Intent Status"
    description: "Mark chapter as complete in book master intent"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_6_complete"
    
    actions:
      - "In book/book_system_intent.yaml:"
      - "  - Find book_structure.part_N_name.chapters[N]"
      - "  - Change status: 'pending' → 'complete'"
      - "  - Update placeholder if actual structure differs from initial plan"
    
    outputs:
      - "Updated book_system_intent.yaml with chapter status:

pdated to complete"
        test: "grep 'status: \"complete\"' intent.yaml"
    
    status_marker: "step_6_complete"
  
  step_7_update_book_intent:
    name: "Update Book Master Intent Status"
    description: "Mark chapter as complete in book master intent"
    
    prerequisites:
      - "step_6_complete"
    
    actions:
      - "In book/book_system_intent.yaml:"
      - "  - Find book_structure.part_N_name.chapters[N]"
      - "  - Change status: 'pending' → 'complete'"
      - "  - Update placeholder if actual structure differs from initial plan"
    
    outputs:
      - "Updated book_system_intent.yaml with chapter status: complete"
    
    verification:
      - check: "Chapter status updated in book intent"
        test: "grep -A 3 'chapter: N' book/book_system_intent.yaml | grep 'status: \"complete\"'"
    
    status_marker: "step_7_complete"

# ==============================================================================
# PROCESS STATE TRACKING
# ==============================================================================

state_tracking:
  how_to_track: |
    Each chapter intent includes:
      process:
        reference: "book/chapter_writing_process.yaml"
        current_step: "step_N_name"
        completed_steps: ["step_1_verify_prerequisites", "step_2_create_chapter_folder", ...]
  
  status_values:
    - "step_1_complete" - Prerequisites verified
    - "step_2_complete" - Folder created
    - "step_3_complete" - Chapter intent written
    - "step_4_complete" - Manuscript written
    - "step_5_complete" - Cross-checks passed
    - "step_6_complete" - Chapter intent status updated
    - "step_7_complete" - Book intent status updated (DONE)

# ==============================================================================
# CONSTRAINTS
# ==============================================================================

constraints:
  - name: "no_skip_steps"
    requirement: "Steps must be executed in order; cannot skip steps"
    validation: "completed_steps array is sequential"
  
  - name: "intent_before_implementation"
    requirement: "Step 3 (create intent) must complete before Step 4 (write manuscript)"
    validation: "intent.yaml created_date < chapter.md created_date"
  
  - name: "cross_check_before_complete"
    requirement: "Step 5 (cross-check) must pass before Step 6 (update status)"
    validation: "All verification checks pass before status: complete"

# ==============================================================================
# RATIONALE
# ==============================================================================

rationale:
  decision: "Capture the chapter writing process as a canonical intent artifact"
  
  reasoning: |
    - This process has been validated through Chapters 1 and 2
    - Following IVD Principle 1 (Intent is Primary): define the process before executing it
    - Following IVD Principle 2 (Understanding Must Be Executable): each step has verification checks
    - Following IVD Principle 5 (Layered Understanding): process → steps → verification → rationale
    - State tracking ensures we always know where we are in the process
    - Co-located with book artifacts (book/chapter_writi

===========================================

rationale:
  decision: "Capture the chapter writing process as a canonical intent artifact"
  
  reasoning: |
    - This process has been validated through Chapters 1 and 2
    - Following IVD Principle 1 (Intent is Primary): define the process before executing it
    - Following IVD Principle 2 (Understanding Must Be Executable): each step has verification checks
    - Following IVD Principle 5 (Layered Understanding): process → steps → verification → rationale
    - State tracking ensures we always know where we are in the process
    - Co-located with book artifacts (book/chapter_writing_process.yaml)
  
  evidence: |
    - Chapters 1 and 2 followed this process successfully
    - Both chapters passed all cross-checks
    - Both chapters marked complete in intents
  
  date: "2026-01-26"
  stakeholder: "IVD book author"

# ==============================================================================
# IMPLEMENTATION
# ==============================================================================

implementation:
  process_artifact: "book/chapter_writing_process.yaml"
  referenced_by:
    - "book/book_system_intent.yaml"
    - "manuscript/part-1-foundations/chapter-01-alignment-crisis/intent.yaml"
    - "manuscript/part-1-foundations/chapter-02-ivd-paradigm/intent.yaml"
  status: "canonical"
  version: 1.2

# ==============================================================================
# CHANGELOG
# ==============================================================================

changelog:
  - version: "1.3"
    date: "2026-02-09"
    change: "Step 3: updated optional sections reminder to include authorship and evaluation alongside interface and roles (e.g. Ch6 evaluation, Ch9 authorship per agent)."
    reason: "New experimental authorship and evaluation sections added to framework."
  - version: "1.2"
    date: "2026-02-09"
    change: "Step 3: updated optional sections reminder to include roles alongside interface (e.g. Ch5 interface + roles, Ch9 interface + roles per agent)."
    reason: "New experimental roles section added to framework; chapters demonstrating agent patterns should include roles in deliverables."
  - version: "1.1"
    date: "2026-02-09"
    change: "Step 3 (Create Chapter-Level Intent): added action to include optional sections in deliverables when the chapter demonstrates them (e.g. Ch5 interface, Ch9 interface per agent)."
    reason: "Ensure future Ch9+ intents include interface/deliverables when relevant."
  - version: "1.0"
    date: "2026-01-26"
    change: "Initial process definition based on Chapters 1 and 2 workflow"
    reason: "Codify successful process for future chapters; ensure consistency"

    change: "Initial process definition based on Chapters 1 and 2 workflow"
    reason: "Codify successful process for future chapters; ensure consistency"
